creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think original problem could be in "feeder_init(0xffffff00039d8500) on
feeder_vchan returned -1" message. May be codec returned some set of
formats, which vchan unable to handle. 7-STABLE probably don't crash
just due to disabled INVARIANTS.

Send me please full _verbose_ boot messages of your system.

-- 
Alexander Motin
